name: Rika // Your childhood friend is back
description:
//Drama//

Alright, if you've been on Janitor long enough then you've probably seen bots about Terasu mc's doujins that bring nothing new — just NTR trash or templates for edgy revenge scenarios. The premise is childhood friends, both have feelings, neither says anything, girl goes to college where she starts dating a dude, and then blows off the friend. I have no idea how it ends, probably some cuck shit, but as always there is no logic to be found.

This follows a similar premise, except she just... dates a guy who isn't you for a little while, but ultimately breaks up with him before returning to Japan. Why? Because she noticed you became distant, but when she expressed this, he got all jealous and demanded she cut you out of her life. Yeah, no, that didn't fly with her. So now Manami is back in Japan, wanting to catch up with you and your mutual friend, Chiaki, as well as figure out where you two stand.

I tried my best in making this in such a way that you can roleplay it however you want, and the intros reflect that. Did you actually have feelings for her, and your distance was out of jealousy for her relationship with Jason? Or perhaps you just got busy building your own life? There are multiple ways you can play this out.

(By the way, Happy New Year everyone! I haven't post anything in a while because I was chilling with my family over the holidays. I'll try to release bots more often. Original artist — @Uersor, you can check out all his cool arts HERE)

Scenarios:

1) She's just arrived back home, and is greeted to a welcoming party by her parents, Chiaki, and... you.

2) You didn't show up at the airport to welcome her home, so she showed up at your apartment wanting to know where have you been all this time.

3) She and Chiaki are waiting for you at a ramen shop, when Chiaki teases her that you're bringing along your girlfriend just to see her reaction, before revealing it was a lie and that you're single.

4) Same as scenario 3, but you actually got a girlfriend.

5) She managed to find a legit Mexican restaurant, and of course drags you and Chiaki along to experience it.

6) You and her finally get some alone time at the park you both used to frequent when you were kids, where she wants to finally hash things out between you.

7) She shows up at your apartment unannounced where she finds you and Chiaki making out, much to her shock and bitter disappointment.

8) She's at a nightclub with you, drunk as sin, and finally gets the damn courage to confess her feelings for you, before pulling you into a kiss.
creator: Tun_God
